vocab.nello scorso: in the last; in the previous

vocab.nello strapiombo: on the overhang; in the overhang
vocab.sulla poggiato: on the slab (note: 'poggiato' refers to a type of rock face)

vocab.in modo tale da: in such a way as to; so that

vocab.quello su: the one about; the one on
vocab.alla parete: to the wall; at the wall

vocab.ne: of it; from it (pronoun, refers back to something previously mentioned)
vocab.non esistono: there are not; do not exist

vocab.andare a: go to; proceed to (often used before an infinitive verb)
vocab.per poter: in order to; so as to

vocab.cerchiamo di: let's try to; we try to

vocab.in maniera: in a way; in a manner
vocab.alle: to the; at the (feminine plural, contraction of 'a' + 'le')

vocab.riusciremo a: we will manage to; we will be able to

vocab.riusciamo a: we manage to; we are able to
vocab.il movimento successivo: the next movement; the following movement
vocab.steso: straight; extended (note: refers to the arm being straight)
vocab.che sta fermo: that stays still; that remains still
vocab.andare a: going to; starting to (note: often used before a verb to indicate beginning an action)
vocab.trazionale: pull; jerk (note: likely a typo for 'trazionare', meaning to pull or jerk)

vocab.andiamo a: we go to; we are going to; we will
vocab.sfruttare: to exploit; to take advantage of; to use
vocab.in modo tale da: in such a way as to; so that

vocab.siete alle prime armi: you are a beginner; you are just starting out
vocab.vi sembrerà: it will seem to you; it will seem
vocab.mi sembrava di fare: it seemed to me I was doing; I felt like I was doing

vocab.abbiamo a che fare con: deal with; have to do with
vocab.ci rimarrà altro che: all we can do is; we have no choice but to

vocab.le prime volte: the first times; the first few times
vocab.rispetto a: with respect to; in relation to
vocab.piglio: grip; hold (note: 'piglio' can mean 'grip' or 'hold', but context may vary)

vocab.andare a indicare: go to point; go to indicate
vocab.si troverà: will be found; will be located

vocab.ci dovremo posizionare: we will have to position ourselves

vocab.del caso: of the case; in this case (note: idiomatic, often means 'if so')
vocab.andremo a svolgere: we will perform; we will carry out

vocab.lapillo successivo: next hold; next grip (lapillo = small rock/hold in climbing)
vocab.converrà: it will be better; it will be advisable
vocab.in modo tale da: in such a way as to; so as to

vocab.marie: marie (likely a mishearing or typo; possibly 'mani' = hands)

vocab.il sinistro: the left (one; usually foot or leg)
vocab.avrà il compito di: will have the task of; will be responsible for
vocab.il più vicino: as close as possible; the closest (note: 'il più' = 'the most', 'vicino' = 'close')

vocab.alla parete: to the wall; on the wall
vocab.dalle immagini: from the images; from the pictures
vocab.avrà il compito di: will have the task of; will be responsible for

vocab.portare: to bring; to carry; to lead

vocab.per forza di cose: necessarily; inevitably (lit. by force of things)
vocab.sugli appoggi: on the supports; on the footholds

vocab.ruoteranno: they will rotate; they will turn

vocab.andare a: to go to; to start to (used before a verb to indicate beginning an action)

vocab.quello di: the one of; that of (construction: 'the act of')

vocab.gli appoggi: the supports; footholds (note: can mean physical or figurative supports)
vocab.gli attivi: the active ones; the actives (note: context-specific, could refer to active holds or supports)
vocab.che si deve muovere: that must move; that has to move
vocab.per andare a prendere: to go get; to go take
vocab.all'ultimo: at the last moment; at the end

vocab.la maggior parte dei casi: most cases; the majority of cases

vocab.conformazione della roccia: shape of the rock; rock formation
vocab.la piglio successivo: the next hold; the next grip

vocab.rinviare: to clear; to send away (sports context: to kick/clear the ball)
vocab.in tallonaggio: in heeling (sports context: using the heel)
vocab.in via: away; off (context: sending the ball away)

vocab.ben speso: well spent; well used (note: idiomatic, means 'well executed' here)
vocab.in maniera un po particolare: in a somewhat particular way; in a rather special way

vocab.alla: to the; at the (feminine singular, contraction of 'a' + 'la')

vocab.riusciamo a: we manage to; we are able to
vocab.ve ne ho parlato: I talked to you about it; I mentioned it to you

vocab.ruotano moltissimo: rotate a lot; turn a lot
vocab.risulta essere: turns out to be; is found to be

vocab.a scavalcare: to pass over; to cross over

vocab.ho tagliato: I cut; I shortened (context: skipped part)
vocab.per andare via: to go away; to move on
vocab.un po' più veloce: a bit faster; a little faster

vocab.alla lotta: to the struggle; to the fight
vocab.anche in questo caso: also in this case; even in this case

vocab.per farvi capire: to make you understand; to show you

vocab.apprendere: to grasp; to grab; to learn (here: to grasp)

vocab.abbiate capito: you (plural) have understood; you got it

vocab.ci consente di: allows us to; enables us to

vocab.dia: give (formal imperative; context: may you have)
vocab.ci vediamo: see you; we'll see each other
